name: yishape-math
desc: YiShape-Math is a high-performance Java math library that provides NumPy-like functionalities including vector & matrix operations, data visualization, statist…
descFull: YiShape-Math is a high-performance Java math library that provides NumPy-like functionalities including vector & matrix operations, data visualization, statistics, optimization, time series, signal processing, multi-criteria programming, distance metric learning, and machine learning models.
